'''jaludu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumonometer|pneumonometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumonometer|pneumonometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jaludu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jælidith|jælidith]] || [[word:jælidij|jælidij]] || [[word:jælidish|jælidish]] || [[word:jælidi|jælidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaluluduth|jaluluduth]] || [[word:jaluluduj|jaluluduj]] || [[word:jaluludush|jaluludush]] || [[word:jaluludu|jaluludu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaluduth|jaluduth]] || [[word:jaluduj|jaluduj]] || [[word:jaludush|jaludush]] || [[word:jaludu|jaludu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalufduth|jalufduth]] || [[word:jalufduj|jalufduj]] || [[word:jalufdush|jalufdush]] || [[word:jalufduf|jalufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaluduthu|jaluduthu]] || [[word:jaluduju|jaluduju]] || [[word:jaludushu|jaludushu]] || [[word:jaluduku|jaluduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaluduth|jaluduth]] || [[word:jaluduj|jaluduj]] || [[word:jaludush|jaludush]] || [[word:jaludu|jaludu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaluduthul|jaluduthul]] || [[word:jaludujul|jaludujul]] || [[word:jaludushul|jaludushul]] || [[word:jaludukul|jaludukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaluduthuthu|jaluduthuthu]] || [[word:jaludujuju|jaludujuju]] || [[word:jaludushushu|jaludushushu]] || [[word:jaluduku|jaluduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaluduthun|jaluduthun]] || [[word:jaludujun|jaludujun]] || [[word:jaludushun|jaludushun]] || [[word:jaludukun|jaludukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaluduthuoro|jaluduthuoro]] || [[word:jaludujuoro|jaludujuoro]] || [[word:jaludushuoro|jaludushuoro]] || [[word:jaludukuoro|jaludukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
